name: paarrot
description: Paarrot - A Matrix client based on Cinny

scripts.android:prepare: cd cinny && npm run build && cd .. && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: cd cinny && npx cap open android
scripts.android:run: cd cinny && npx cap run android
scripts.android:apk: npm run apply-overlay && npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run apply-overlay && npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:apk:linux: cd cinny && npm run build && cd .. && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:aab: npm run apply-overlay && npm run android:prepare && cd cinny/android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
